notes: Deliberately-weak floor (the user-identified genuinely-weak end). GPT-5.4-mini run via a codex sub-agent; FS-sandboxed, so its host sidecar is invisible — capture observed commands from the codex --json stream via ParseCodexJSON. Runs commands UNATTENDED in codex's own sandbox (no -a, no --dangerously).

Use the REAL claude binary path, NOT the nix-darwin fish wrapper named `claude` — the wrapper injects --remote-control, which disables features. Reads local files via Bash; tool calls go through the PATH-interposed fixture binary to the host sidecar, captured via ParseSidecar. GATED: may be classifier-blocked in-session; run on-demand.

Mid-tier, different provider. Top of the initial roster (ranks 1–3). Empty model omits -m so codex uses its default (the strong tier). FS-sandboxed codex; capture observed commands from the codex --json stream via ParseCodexJSON.
Ceiling. DEFERRED (decision 1): NOT in the initial roster. Added once the deterministic spine proves useful, to skip ceiling-validation cost up front.
DEFERRED. Cloud workspace (not a local exec): a local-kimi alternative, user-run. Session-based — returns a URL and needs session management. No local exec adapter is wired in this phase.
DEFERRED. Needs --approval-mode authorization before it can run tool calls non-interactively. No local exec adapter is wired in this phase.
